SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAO, GUOQUANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HYANG, TO OWNER OF KOREAN RESTAURANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
